stage.subtitle_ar: افتحي المتصفّح واكتشفي كيف تعمل المواقع، وكيف تحمين حسابكِ، وكيف تجدين أي معلومة بذكاء.

content.intro_ar: المتصفّح هو النافذة التي تدخلين منها إلى عالم الويب كلّه، وكطالبة في تخصّص التقنية ستقضين وقتاً طويلاً بين المواقع وصفحاتها. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّمين بالإنجليزية أسماء الأجزاء التي تستخدمينها كلّ يوم: المتصفّح، الموقع، الصفحة، والرابط. تخيّلي أنّكِ تشرحين للمستخدم كيف يفتح موقعاً، فهذه هي الكلمات التي ستحتاجينها.

vocab.meaning_en: a program you use to open websites
vocab.example: Chrome is a popular browser.

vocab.meaning_en: a set of pages on the internet
vocab.example: This website has many pages.

vocab.meaning_en: one single page on a website
vocab.example: The home web page loads first.

vocab.meaning_en: text or an image you click to go to another page
vocab.example: Click the link to open the next page.

vocab.meaning_en: the box where you type a website address
vocab.example: Type the address in the address bar.

vocab.meaning_en: the full address of a web page
vocab.example: Every web page has its own URL.

vocab.meaning_en: one open page inside the browser
vocab.example: I keep three tabs open at work.

vocab.meaning_en: the main or first page of a website
vocab.example: The home page shows the main menu.

vocab.meaning_en: when a page opens and shows on the screen
vocab.example: The page takes a few seconds to load.

vocab.meaning_en: to press a button on the mouse
vocab.example: Click the button to send the form.

vocab.meaning_en: a saved link you can open again fast
vocab.example: I saved the site as a bookmark.

vocab.meaning_en: to load a page again to get new content
vocab.example: Refresh the page to see the new post.

paragraphs: A browser is a program that opens the web. Chrome, Safari, and Firefox are all browsers. When you want to visit a website, you open the browser first. Then you look at the address bar at the top of the window. This is the box where you type the URL, or web address, of the site.

After you type the URL and press Enter, the page begins to load. In a few seconds, the home page shows on the screen. The home page is the main page of the website. From here, you can click a link to move to another web page. A link can be blue text or an image.

You can open many pages at the same time. Each page sits in its own tab at the top of the browser. If a page looks old or does not work, you can refresh it to load it again. When you find a good site, save it as a bookmark. Next time, you click the bookmark and the website opens fast, with no typing.

key_phrases.en: Open the browser and go to the website.
Type the URL in the address bar.
key_phrases.ar: اكتبي عنوان الموقع في شريط العنوان.

key_phrases.en: Click the link to open the page.
Open it in a new tab.
Save this website as a bookmark.

comprehension.question: What is a browser?
options: A program that opens the web
comprehension.correct: A program that opens the web
comprehension.explanation_ar: المتصفّح برنامج نفتح به الويب، مثل كروم وسفاري وفايرفوكس.

comprehension.question: Where do you type the URL?
comprehension.explanation_ar: نكتب عنوان الموقع (URL) في شريط العنوان أعلى النافذة.

comprehension.question: What happens after you press Enter?
comprehension.explanation_ar: بعد الضغط على Enter تبدأ الصفحة بالتحميل حتى تظهر على الشاشة.

comprehension.question: What is the home page?
options: The main page of a website
comprehension.correct: The main page of a website
comprehension.explanation_ar: الصفحة الرئيسية هي الصفحة الأساسية للموقع التي تظهر أولاً.

comprehension.question: Why do you save a bookmark?
options: To open a good site again fast
comprehension.correct: To open a good site again fast
comprehension.explanation_ar: نحفظ العلامة المرجعية لنفتح الموقع الجيّد بسرعة دون كتابة عنوانه.

comprehension.question: What do you do when a page looks old or does not work?
comprehension.explanation_ar: نضغط على تحديث (refresh) لإعادة تحميل الصفحة وجلب المحتوى الجديد.

task.prompt_en: Write 3-4 sentences about how you open your favorite website. Say which browser you use and what you do step by step.
task.prompt_ar: اكتبي ٣-٤ جُمل عن كيف تفتحين موقعكِ المفضّل. اذكري المتصفّح الذي تستخدمينه وما تفعلينه خطوة بخطوة.
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي على الأقل ٣ كلمات من كلمات الدرس مثل: browser، URL، address bar، link، tab.

content.intro_ar: في كلّ موقع تقريباً ستحتاجين حساباً خاصّاً بكِ، ومع الحساب تأتي مسؤولية حمايته. كطالبة تقنية، الأمان الرقمي ليس خياراً بل جزء من عملكِ اليومي. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّمين بالإنجليزية كلمات الحساب وكلمة المرور وتسجيل الدخول، وكيف تحمين نفسكِ من الاحتيال. تخيّلي أنّكِ تنصحين صديقة كيف تبقي حسابها آمناً.

vocab.meaning_en: your own space on a website with your name and data
vocab.example: I made a new account on the site.

vocab.meaning_en: the name you use to sign in
vocab.example: Please type your username here.

vocab.meaning_en: a secret word that protects your account
vocab.example: Choose a strong password.

vocab.meaning_en: to enter your account with your name and password
vocab.example: Sign in to read your messages.

vocab.meaning_en: to make a new account
vocab.example: Sign up to start using the app.

vocab.meaning_en: to leave your account safely
vocab.example: Log out when you finish on a shared computer.

vocab.meaning_en: safe and protected
vocab.example: A good password keeps your account secure.

vocab.meaning_en: only for you, not for other people
vocab.example: Keep your password private.

vocab.meaning_en: a person who tries to break into accounts
vocab.example: A hacker wants to steal your data.

vocab.meaning_en: a trick to take your money or data
vocab.example: That free-prize email is a scam.

vocab.meaning_en: to check that something is real or true
vocab.example: The site sends a code to verify it is you.

vocab.meaning_en: a second safety step, like a code on your phone
vocab.example: Turn on two-factor login for more safety.

paragraphs: To use most websites, you need an account. First you sign up with a username and a password. The username is your name on the site. The password is a secret word. A strong password is long and hard to guess. Keep it private and never share it with other people.

When you want to enter your account, you sign in with your username and password. When you finish, you log out. This is very important on a shared computer, so no one else can open your account. To stay more secure, turn on two-factor login. The site then sends a code to your phone to verify that it is really you.

Be careful of a scam. A hacker may send an email that looks real and asks for your password. A safe website never asks for your password by email. If a message says you won a big prize, do not click the link. When you protect your account, you protect your data and your money.

key_phrases.en: Sign up with a username and a password.
key_phrases.ar: سجّلي بإنشاء اسم مستخدم وكلمة مرور.

key_phrases.en: Turn on two-factor login to stay secure.
Never share your password. It might be a scam.
key_phrases.ar: لا تشاركي كلمة المرور أبداً؛ قد يكون الأمر احتيالاً.

comprehension.question: What do you do first to use a new website?
comprehension.explanation_ar: أولاً ننشئ حساباً (sign up) باسم مستخدم وكلمة مرور.

comprehension.question: What is a password?
options: A secret word that protects your account
comprehension.correct: A secret word that protects your account
comprehension.explanation_ar: كلمة المرور كلمة سرّية تحمي حسابكِ، ويجب أن تبقى خاصّة.

comprehension.question: Why should you log out on a shared computer?
options: To make the page load faster
So no one else can open your account
comprehension.correct: So no one else can open your account
comprehension.explanation_ar: نسجّل الخروج على جهاز مشترك حتى لا يستطيع أحد فتح حسابنا.

comprehension.question: What does two-factor login do?
options: It sends a code to verify it is you
comprehension.correct: It sends a code to verify it is you
comprehension.explanation_ar: التحقّق بخطوتين يرسل رمزاً إلى هاتفكِ للتأكّد أنّكِ أنتِ فعلاً.

comprehension.question: A safe website will never ask for your password by...
comprehension.explanation_ar: الموقع الآمن لا يطلب كلمة المرور عبر البريد الإلكتروني أبداً.

comprehension.question: What should you do with an email that says you won a big prize?
comprehension.explanation_ar: رسالة الجائزة الكبيرة غالباً احتيال؛ لا تنقري على الرابط.

task.prompt_en: Write 3-4 sentences of advice for a friend about staying safe online. Tell her how to make her account secure.
task.prompt_ar: اكتبي ٣-٤ جُمل نصيحة لصديقة عن البقاء آمنة على الإنترنت. أخبريها كيف تجعل حسابها آمناً.
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي على الأقل ٣ كلمات من كلمات الدرس مثل: password، account، secure، log out، scam.

content.intro_ar: البحث الجيّد مهارة أساسية لكلّ مبرمجة؛ فأنتِ ستبحثين عن حلول وأفكار ومعلومات كلّ يوم. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّمين بالإنجليزية كيف تكتبين كلمات بحث ذكية، وتقرئين النتائج، وتختارين مصدراً موثوقاً. تخيّلي أنّكِ تبحثين عن جواب لسؤال في مشروعكِ، فالطريقة التي تسألين بها تغيّر ما تجدين.

vocab.meaning_en: a website that helps you find pages, like Google
vocab.example: Google is a famous search engine.

vocab.meaning_en: to look for information online
vocab.example: I search for answers every day.

vocab.meaning_en: an important word you type to find something
vocab.example: Use a clear keyword to get good results.

vocab.meaning_en: a page the search engine shows you
vocab.example: The first result is often useful.

vocab.meaning_en: the words you type into the search box
vocab.example: A short query can still be very clear.

vocab.meaning_en: facts and knowledge about something
vocab.example: I found good information on that page.

vocab.meaning_en: the place where information comes from
vocab.example: Always check the source of the news.

vocab.meaning_en: something you can trust
vocab.example: This website is a reliable source.

vocab.meaning_en: a tool that shows only the results you want
vocab.example: Use a filter to see only recent pages.

vocab.meaning_en: to look through pages without a fixed plan
vocab.example: I browse many pages before I choose one.

vocab.meaning_en: the subject you are reading about
vocab.example: This page is about one clear topic.

vocab.meaning_en: correct and with no mistakes
vocab.example: Good sources give accurate facts.

paragraphs: The internet is very big, so we use a search engine to find things. Google is the most famous one. You type your query in the search box and press Enter. In a moment, the search engine shows a list of results. Each result is a link to a web page about your topic.

To get good results, choose your keyword with care. A short and clear keyword works best. If you type too many words, the results may not match. You can also use a filter to see only new pages or only images. Then you browse the list and open the pages that look useful.

Not every page has good information. Some pages are old, and some are wrong. Always look at the source. Is it a reliable website, like a school, a company, or a well-known news site? A reliable source gives accurate facts. When you compare two or three sources, you can trust the answer more.

key_phrases.en: Type your query in the search box.
key_phrases.ar: اكتبي عبارة البحث في مربّع البحث.

key_phrases.en: Use a filter to see recent pages.
Check the source before you trust it.
key_phrases.ar: تحقّقي من المصدر قبل أن تثقي به.

key_phrases.en: Is this a reliable and accurate source?

comprehension.question: What do we use to find things on the internet?
comprehension.explanation_ar: نستخدم محرّك بحث مثل Google لإيجاد الصفحات على الإنترنت.

comprehension.question: What is a result?
options: A link to a web page about your topic
comprehension.correct: A link to a web page about your topic
comprehension.explanation_ar: النتيجة رابط إلى صفحة ويب تتعلّق بموضوع بحثكِ.

comprehension.question: What kind of keyword works best?
comprehension.explanation_ar: الكلمة المفتاحية القصيرة الواضحة تعطي أفضل النتائج.

comprehension.question: Why should you look at the source?
options: To know if the information is reliable
comprehension.correct: To know if the information is reliable
comprehension.explanation_ar: ننظر إلى المصدر لنعرف إن كانت المعلومات موثوقة ودقيقة.

comprehension.question: What does a filter do?
options: It shows only the results you want
It writes the query for you
comprehension.correct: It shows only the results you want
comprehension.explanation_ar: المرشّح يعرض فقط النتائج التي تريدينها، مثل الصفحات الحديثة أو الصور.

comprehension.question: How can you trust an answer more?
comprehension.explanation_ar: عند مقارنة مصدرين أو ثلاثة يمكنكِ الوثوق بالإجابة أكثر.

task.prompt_en: Choose a topic you like. Write 3-4 sentences about how you would search for it and how you would check if the source is good.
task.prompt_ar: اختاري موضوعاً تحبّينه. اكتبي ٣-٤ جُمل عن كيف ستبحثين عنه وكيف تتأكّدين أنّ المصدر جيّد.
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي على الأقل ٣ كلمات من كلمات الدرس مثل: search engine، keyword، result، source، reliable.
